components.name: RHEL 7
components.notes: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 reached End of Life on June 30, 2024.

components.name: Java 11
components.notes: Java 11 LTS — Oracle Premier Support ended September 2023. Extended support available but requires additional licensing. Should upgrade to Java 21 LTS.

components.name: Websphere 7.0
components.notes: IBM WebSphere Application Server 7.0 reached End of Support in September 2015. Extremely outdated.

components.name: Amazon RDS MySQL
components.notes: Amazon RDS MySQL is a managed service. AWS manages patching and updates. Treated as current unless specific version is pinned.

summary: CRMApp-002 runs on EOL RHEL 7 with a critically outdated WebSphere 7.0 application server (EOL since 2015) and outdated Java 11. Despite cloud deployment on AWS, the underlying stack has serious lifecycle gaps.
